zh.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne於1600年5月4日出生在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。他於1653年2月14日與Elisabeth Oakley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1665年9月29日在荷蘭享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne于1600年5月4日出生在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。他于1653年2月14日与Elisabeth Oakley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1665年9月29日在荷兰享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.description: "The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."
Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn was born in Leiden, the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne was born on 4 May 1600, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. He married Elisabeth Oakley on 14 February 1653, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 29 September 1665, in Netherlands, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne est né le 4 mai 1600, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Elisabeth Oakley le 14 février 1653, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1665, à Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Browneは1600年5月4日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた。1653年2月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでElisabeth Oakleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1665年9月29日にオランダで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne(은)는 1600년 5월 4일 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났다. 그는 1653년 2월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Elisabeth Oakley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1665년 9월 29일 네덜란드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne nasceu em 4 de maio de 1600, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Oakley em 14 de fevereiro de 1653, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1665, em Países Baixos, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne родился 4 мая 1600 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Oakley 14 февраля 1653 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1665 г. в местности Нидерланды в возрасте 65 лет.
